items.title: 2026 MRS Fall Meeting & Exhibit
items.content_text: The 2026 MRS Fall Meeting & Exhibit returns to Boston, Massachusetts, November 29 – December 4, 2026, at the Hynes Convention Center and Sheraton Boston Hotel, bringing together the global materials research community for a week of innovation.

items.title: 2027 MRS Spring Meeting & Exhibit
items.content_text: From April 5–9, 2027, researchers worldwide will gather in Seattle, Washington for the 2027 MRS Spring Meeting & Exhibit to share advances across disciplines, exchange technical insights, and explore the future of materials science and innovation.

items.title: 2027 MRS Fall Meeting & Exhibit
items.content_text: The 2027 MRS Fall Meeting & Exhibit will take place November 28-December 3, 2025 in Boston, Massachusetts, at the Hynes Convention Center and adjacent Sheraton Boston Hotel.

items.title: Materials Research Society
items.content_text:
Founded in 1973, the Materials Research Society (MRS) is a global, member-driven organization and a recognized leader in the advancement of interdisciplinary materials research. With Membership spanning academia, industry, and government and hailing from 90+ countries, MRS fosters collaboration across physics, chemistry, biology, engineering, and beyond.

MRS brings a broad range of Members, from students to Nobel Laureates, together to exchange ideas and drive innovation. Nearly half of MRS Members—and many authors, attendees, and visitors—come from outside the U.S., reflecting the society’s global reach.

Through world-renowned Meetings, peer-reviewed journals, webinars, workshops, advocacy, volunteer opportunities, career development, worldwide collaborations, and more, MRS is committed
